description_long: This object is a cylindrical cigarette, featuring a tightly wrapped paper exterior with a mottled pattern of white, gray, and tan hues. One end of the cigarette displays a tan-colored filter, which is slightly textured and distinct from the rest of the body. The opposite end appears to be the tip, showing a subtle reddish-brown coloration that suggests the presence of tobacco but no visible ash or burn marks. The paper wrapping is slightly uneven, giving the cigarette a somewhat crumpled and realistic appearance. The overall length and slenderness are typical of a standard commercial cigarette. No branding, logos, or text are visible on the surface.
description: A slender, cylindrical cigarette with a tan filter and mottled white-gray paper wrapping, showing no branding or burn marks.
description_view_0: The cigarette is seen at an angle, highlighting the tan filter end and the mottled paper wrapping along its length.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full length of the cigarette, with the tan filter on the right and the grayish paper body extending left.
description_view_2: The opposite angle, focusing on the paper-wrapped body and the rounded tip, with the filter less prominent.
description_view_3: A direct side view emphasizing the cylindrical shape and the transition from the tan filter to the white-gray paper body.
